title: 鞍山市第二学期期末考试真题卷

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 第一节 A
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料,从每题所给的A、B、C、D四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Teng Fei is a middle school student from China. He is 13 years old. Now he is on vacation with his parents in London. It is 5 o'clock on Wednesday afternoon, and it is raining. He is looking at the weather report on his computer.

**未来五天天气预报 (Next Five Days)**
* 周四 (Thursday): 0 - 12℃ (多云 ⛅)
* 周五 (Friday): -2 - 10℃ (晴 ☀️)
* 周六 (Saturday): -3 - 8℃ (晴 ☀️)
* 周日 (Sunday): -5 - 6°C (大风 💨)
* 周一 (Monday): -12 - 0℃ (有雪 ❄️)

**未来 24 小时温度变化 (Temperature in the Next 24 Hours)**
* 当前 (now): 4°C
* 20:00: 2°C
* 23:00: 1°C
* 02:00: 0°C
* 05:00: 0°C
* 08:00: 2°C
* 11:00: 10°C
* 13:00: 12°C
* 15:00: 6°C

questions.prompt: How is the weather on Friday?
questions.explanation: 根据未来五天天气预报（Next Five Days），周五（Friday）的天气是晴天（☀️），对应 Sunny。故选A。

questions.prompt: Next Monday can be a good day for _______.
questions.translation: 下周一可能是适合做_______的好日子。
questions.explanation: 下周一（Monday）的天气是有雪（❄️）且温度在 -12 到 0°C 之间，非常适合堆雪人（making a snowman），故选C。

questions.prompt: At 11 o'clock on Thursday, the temperature is _______.
questions.explanation: 根据未来 24 小时气温变化图，11:00 时对应的温度点标示为 10°C，故选D。

questions.prompt: Which of the following is TRUE?
options: It is 4°C in London right now.
Teng Fei is studying English in England.
questions.explanation: 根据未来 24 小时温度变化图，当前（now）在伦敦的气温标记是 4°C，因此B选项正确。

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 第一节 B
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料,从每题所给的A、B、C、D四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Many people like sugar. Do you know where we get sugar from? Most of our sugar comes from two plants: sugar cane(甘蔗) and sugar beets(甜菜). Sugar cane is a tall plant. It grows in hot countries. However, sugar beet grows in cool places.

There are many different kinds of sugar, and we use them in different ways. We can often see white sugar in our lives. You can put it in your tea or coffee. Brown sugar has a strong taste. People often use it to make cakes.

Is sugar nice or harmful? It's difficult to say. In some traditional ways, sugar is useful for our lives and makes us strong. But eating too much sugar isn't good for our teeth. It can hurt our teeth and make us fat. Being fat can bring us many health problems. So if you like sugar, it's important to eat it in a right way. Make sure not to eat too much. A little sugar is fine and can give you some power. You can eat lots of healthy food like fruits and vegetables, take lots of exercise every day!

questions.prompt: What do we know about sugar beet?
options: It has more sugar than sugar cane.
questions.translation: 关于甜菜我们知道什么？
questions.explanation: 根据第一段最后一句 'However, sugar beet grows in cool places.' 可知，甜菜生长在凉爽的地方，故选A。

questions.prompt: People often use _______ to make cakes.
questions.translation: 人们经常用_______来制作蛋糕。
questions.explanation: 根据第二段最后一句 'People often use it (brown sugar) to make cakes.' 可知，人们经常用红糖来做蛋糕，故选B。

questions.prompt: What's the meaning of the word "harmful" in Paragraph 3?
questions.translation: 第三段中单词“harmful”的意思是什么？
questions.explanation: 根据第三段中 'Is sugar nice or harmful? ... But eating too much sugar isn't good for our teeth.' 可知，此处 nice（好的）与 harmful 构成对比，harmful 意为“有害的”，与 Bad（坏的，有害的）意思相近，故选C。

questions.prompt: Having too much sugar can _______.
questions.explanation: 根据第三段 'It can hurt our teeth and make us fat. Being fat can bring us many health problems.' 可知，吃太多糖会带来健康问题，故选C。

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 第一节 C
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料,从每题所给的A、B、C、D四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Have you ever seen an animal show? Recently, many animal activists (活动人士) became very angry after seeing worrying pictures and videos of an elephant called Molly. They wanted to save her.

Molly is an Asian elephant. She was born in 2016. Everyone liked her and called her Little Princess. But three years later, she was separated from her mother and was sent to live in another zoo. At her new home, Molly was trained to perform(表演) for tourists. To save Molly, Internet users joined the project "Save Molly" on some social media platforms(平台). Finally, zookeepers returned Molly to her original home, which had better living conditions. But many see this as only a small victory. An Internet user wrote, "This is just the first step. There is much more to be done."

Should animals perform? In the zoo, Molly learnt many things. But she was unhappy. These skills are not necessary for an elephant. She learnt these things to perform for tourists. Have you ever watched animal performances? The lights and noises during a performance make them nervous. Their cages are small and dirty. The animals often live shorter lives than in the wild. Now, some countries ban (禁止) wild animal performances.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose(目的) of the question at the beginning?
questions.translation: 开头提问的目的是什么？
questions.explanation: 文章开头问 'Have you ever seen an animal show?' 是为了引出下文关于动物表演和拯救大象Molly的话题，故选C。

questions.prompt: Why did many animal activists become very angry?
options: The elephant called Molly was in danger.
Molly had to live in another zoo.
Animals didn't perform well if they didn't get food.
They saw some worrying pictures and videos of Molly.
questions.translation: 为什么很多动物活动人士变得非常愤怒？
questions.explanation: 根据第一段第二句 'Recently, many animal activists became very angry after seeing worrying pictures and videos of an elephant called Molly.' 可知，是因为看到了有关大象Molly的令人担忧的照片和视频，故选D。

questions.prompt: The meaning of the underlined phrase "was separated from" is _______ in Chinese.
questions.translation: 画线短语“was separated from”在中文里的意思是什么？
questions.explanation: 根据第二段 'she was separated from her mother and was sent to live in another zoo'，她被迫与母亲“分离”并被送到另一个动物园，故选C。

questions.prompt: How did Internet users help to save Molly?
options: They made use of some social media platforms.
They protected the elephant with enough food and water.
They raised some money for Molly by running a long way.
They returned Molly to her original home in Kunming.
questions.translation: 互联网用户是如何帮助拯救Molly的？
questions.explanation: 根据第二段中 'Internet users joined the project "Save Molly" on some social media platforms(平台).' 可知，他们是利用社交媒体平台来参与拯救行动的，故选A。

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 第一节 D
sections.instruction: 阅读下面语言材料,从每题所给的A、B、C、D四个选项中选出最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Artificial intelligence (AI) is part of our daily life now. Chatbots (聊天机器人) like DeepSeek can answer questions fast. But some teachers worry students might rely on (依赖) them and stop learning by themselves. Here are two students' opinions about AI.

**Peter's View**
Peter, 13, from Chengdu, thinks AI can change how we study. People fear students will cheat with chatbots, but programmers will make chatbots just guide, not give direct(直接的) answers. Chatbots can also help teachers plan lessons. AI is here to stay, and we should follow with the times.

**Helen's View**
Helen, 14, from Boston, believes schoolwork should teach us skills and develop our brains. We learn math and handwriting on our own, even with tools like calculators(计算器) and computers. Our brains need exercise. AI might help adults, but it's not good for kids to use it before learning the basics (基础).

questions.prompt: What does the underlined word "them" refer to in the first paragraph?
questions.translation: 第一段中画线的单词“them”指的是什么？
questions.explanation: 结合前一句 'Chatbots (聊天机器人) like DeepSeek can answer questions fast.'，后一句提到老师担心学生可能会依赖“它们”（指代 Chatbots），故选C。

questions.prompt: According to Peter, programmers will make chatbots _______.
questions.translation: 根据彼得的说法，程序员会让聊天机器人_______。
questions.explanation: 根据 Peter's View 中 'programmers will make chatbots just guide, not give direct answers' 可知，程序员会让聊天机器人只引导学生，而不直接给出答案，故选B。

questions.prompt: What does Helen think schoolwork should do for students?
options: Just help them pass the exams.
Only focus on handwriting and math.
Teach them skills and develop their brains.
questions.translation: 海伦认为学校的功课应该为学生做什么？
questions.explanation: 根据 Helen's View 第一句 'believes schoolwork should teach us skills and develop our brains.'，她认为学校功课应该教授技能并开发大脑，故选D。

questions.prompt: We may read the passage from _______.
questions.translation: 我们可能会在_______读到这篇文章。
questions.explanation: 文章讨论的是人工智能（AI）这一科学科技话题，最可能刊登在科学杂志上，选B。

sections.title: 一、阅读理解 第二节
sections.instruction: 阅读短文,从方框内所给的选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项,其中有一个多余的选项。
sections.passage:
Family rules are useful. They help children to grow healthily. [1] But how to make family rules? Let me help you.

**Have a family meeting.**
Having a family meeting is important. [2] And you can ask them what good family rules are. Then they are happy to follow the rules.

**For every "Don't", give a "Do".**
It doesn't work to tell children not to do something. [3] For example, "Do your homework first; don't watch TV before finishing your homework."

**Keep the family rules simple.**
Children don't know what "Be good" means. But they do know what "Use friendly words" means. [4] You need to keep the family rules to 5-7.

**Write down the family rules.**
You must write down all the family rules. When family members see them, they know they have to follow the rules.

Every family needs family rules. They really work well. So now make your own family rules.
wordbank: You have to teach them how to do it.
Children can't remember many family rules.
So it's important for you to make some family rules.
You can tell your children why you want to make some rules.
Do you have very strict family rules?

questions.answer: So it's important for you to make some family rules.
questions.translation: 所以对你来说制定一些家规是很重要的。
questions.explanation: 承接前文家规很有用、帮助孩子健康成长，后文又问如何制定家规，所以填入“制定一些家规很重要”逻辑最连贯，故选C。

questions.answer: You can tell your children why you want to make some rules.
questions.translation: 你可以告诉你的孩子们你为什么要制定一些规则。
questions.explanation: 在家庭会议的段落中，后文提到“你可以问他们什么是好的家规，这样他们就乐意遵守”，因此前文应当是告诉他们为什么要制定规则，故选D。

questions.answer: You have to teach them how to do it.
questions.translation: 你必须教会他们如何去做。
questions.explanation: 段落主题是“给每一个Don't配一个Do”（多给正面引导），单纯告诉孩子不要做什么没用，应当教他们该如何去做（Do），故选A。

questions.answer: Children can't remember many family rules.
questions.translation: 孩子们记不住太多的家规。
questions.explanation: 根据段落主题“保持家规简单”以及后句“需要把家规控制在5-7条”，可以推断出原因是“孩子记不住太多规则”，故选B。

sections.title: 二、完形填空
sections.instruction: 阅读短文,理解其大意,从A、B、C、D四个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。
sections.passage:
Long long ago, there was a farmer in the State of Song. He worked hard every day on the [1]. One day, [2] he was working on the farm, he saw a rabbit run into a tree stump(树桩) and die(死亡). "What a surprise! I will take it home and cook a good dinner," [3] the farmer.

Then the farmer took the rabbit home and cooked [4] in the kitchen. That was so delicious. He was really [5]. That night he thought, "I don't need to work so [6]. All I have to do is to wait here every day and pick up the rabbit that runs into the stump."

The next day, he stopped working and sat [7] the tree stump, waiting for another rabbit to come and run into it. But he [8] saw another rabbit run into the tree stump after that. Day after day, he didn't [9] or water his crops (庄稼) and they all died. In the end, the farmer had no food and lost his life before any rabbit came.

The story tells us that "no pain, no gain (收获)". So please remember that we can't always be so [10]. If we want something, we should work hard and try our best to get it.

questions.explanation: 根据常识和后文的 'working on the farm'，农民每天在农田（farm）里辛勤工作。故选C。
当他在田里工作时，他看到一只兔子撞在树桩上死了，用连词 when。故选A。
引号里是农民说的话，故用 said。选D。
这里代指前文的兔子（单数名词），用代词宾格 it。故选C。
吃到了美味的兔子肉，农民感到非常高兴（happy）。故选A。
因为打算守株待兔，他觉得不需要再那么努力工作（work hard）了。故选D。
sat by the tree stump 表示坐在树桩旁等待。故选A。
兔子撞死是偶发事件，在那之后他再也没有（never）看到有兔子撞上树桩。故选C。
他整天等待，不再种植（grow）或浇灌他的庄稼。故选D。
故事告诉我们一份耕耘一份收获，我们不能总是想着不劳而获、指望运气（lucky）。故选B。

sections.title: 三、语篇填空
sections.instruction: 根据规则，现已将原本需要手工录入的语篇填空题转换为【下拉菜单单项选择题】，请从给出的选项中选出最契合上下文的正确答案形式。
sections.passage: There is a famous place called Mount Huangshan. It is very beautiful. Many tourists go there rain [1] shine. The weather doesn't affect [2] (people) love for it. Many tourists come here to enjoy the beautiful scenery. They start [3] the rest area at the foot of the mountain. They see the special rocks and enjoy the magical scenery. It is often tiring, but they are [4] (usual) in high spirits because they want [5] (reach) the Bright Peak. As they get higher, the temperature [6] (get) lower. Sometimes it is foggy, and the ground may be wet. They can see grey clouds around [7] (they). But when they reach the top of Bright Peak, they feel very [8] (excite). The sunlight shines through the clouds, and while they [9] (stand) there, they can see the beautiful views in all directions—north, west, south, and east. It seems like they are at the centre of a magical world. People shout with joy at the top. At the end of the trip, they have [10] unforgettable experience. They think Mount Huangshan is really a great mountain.

questions.explanation: 固定搭配 rain or shine 意为“风雨无阻”，在此填连词 or。
修饰名词 love 应用名词所有格形式 people's，意为“人们的喜爱”。
固定搭配 start from... 意为“从……出发/开始”。
修饰介词短语 in high spirits，应用副词 usually。
固定搭配 want to do sth. 意为“想要做某事”，故用 to reach。
主语 temperature 是单数，描述客观规律或普遍状态用一般现在时，动词 get 用单三形式 gets。
介词 around 后面需要接代词的宾格形式 them 作宾语。
feel 是系动词，后接形容词作表语。主语是人（they），通常用以 -ed 结尾的形容词 excited 表示“兴奋的”。
while 引导的时间状语从句通常使用进行时态，主语 they 对应 be 动词 are，填 are standing。
experience 表示“经历”时是可数名词，此处表泛指，unforgettable 以元音音素开头，用不定冠词 an。

sections.title: 四、阅读与表达
sections.instruction: 根据短文内容，完成下列各题（根据规则，前三题简答已改造为最佳单选项，第四题主观题升级为多项备选包容性考核模式）。
sections.passage:
Many people like to travel by plane because it is fast, but I don't like it because an airport is usually far from the city. You have to get there early and wait for hours for the plane to take off and it is often late. You can't open the window. You can't choose the food. Planes are fast but it still takes hours to get out of the airport and into the city.

I like travelling by train. I think trains are safe. Train stations are in cities. When you can't catch a train, you can catch another one. You can walk around on the train. You can see many interesting things on your way. I know it takes a little more time.

I also like travelling by car. You can start your trip when you want to, and you don't need to get to a train station or a bus stop. Also, you can carry many things with you in a car. But sometimes there are too many cars on the road.

questions.prompt: Why do many people like travelling by plane?
questions.translation: 为什么很多人喜欢乘飞机旅行？
questions.explanation: 第一段首句 'Many people like to travel by plane because it is fast'，说明乘飞机快，选B。

questions.prompt: Where are train stations usually located?
options: They are usually far from the cities.
They are usually in the countryside.
questions.explanation: 根据第二段第三句 'Train stations are in cities.' 可知，火车站通常建在城市里，选B。

questions.prompt: What's the problem sometimes when travelling by car?
options: Sometimes there are too many cars on the road.
You cannot start the trip when you want to.
questions.translation: 有时候乘汽车旅行的问题是什么？
questions.explanation: 根据第三段最后一句 'But sometimes there are too many cars on the road.'，开车出行有时路上车太多，会导致拥堵。选C。

questions.prompt: Which way do you like best? And why? Write 30 words or more. (Select the statement that best matches the writing requirements)
options: I like plane best. Because it's fast. I can go to cities quickly.
I like travelling by train best. Because it is safe and I can walk around and see many interesting things on the way.
I don't like to travel by car or plane or train because they are all very boring.
Car. I play with it every Saturday afternoon. It makes me happy.
questions.translation: 你最喜欢哪种出行方式？为什么？写30个词以上。（选出最符合写作要求的一项）
questions.explanation: 第二项表述语法正确、句意连贯，完整阐述了最喜欢火车的原因，词数合适且内容积极健康，最符合题目表述与写作规范，选B。
